title: baccharoides calvoana var. microcephala
intro: Baccharoides calvoana var. microcephala, also known as Small-headed Baccharis, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Baccharoides calvoana var. microcephala, including infusions and decoctions, are used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections.
